title: cota rigescens
intro: Cota rigescens, also known as the upright knawel, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. Cota rigescens is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
